{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Gate to Valinhall
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Gate to Valinhall]] can be summoned by [[Azura]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate events]]
